title: Report on the proposed DRIVE35 Scale-Up Grants scheme by UK Research and Innovation
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to UKRI concerning the proposed DRIVE35 Scale-Up Grants scheme.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of UKRI’s Assessment of Compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed DRIVE35 Scale-Up Grants scheme by UK Research and Innovation page. "
